'''âng-w-b-h''' ('''kangawbehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jazzercise|jazzercise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jazzercise|jazzercise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-w-b-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangawbehoko
|}
